text.title: Freelance Pilot Pricing Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: 2-week onboarding rebuild pilot for Acme.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Solo dev launches a productized '2-week onboarding rebuild' offering. Target standard price $6000. Acme is pilot customer #3. Cost basis (tools + 60h time) = $2800.

section.title: Output
section.code: { "pilot_id": "pp-acme-onboarding-2026q2", "offering": "2-week onboarding rebuild", "customer": "Acme Corp", "price": 3500, "cost_basis": 2800, "standard_price": 6000, "timebox_days": 14, "case_study_consent": {"logo": true, "metrics": true, "captured_at": "2026-05-20"}, "transition_clause": "Continuation past 14-day timebox or any renewal billed at standard $6000 rate.", "owner": "@ruslan" }

list.item: Case-study consent captured with date — rule case-study-consent-written.
transition_clause >30 chars stating standard price + trigger — rule transition-price-documented.
